name: IdsEdwPMedHomeHierExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte AS ( SELECT MED_HOME_LOC_ID, MED_HOME_LOC_STRT_DT_SK, PROV_ID, PCP_STRT_DT_SK, ENTY_MED_HOME_ID, FCTS_ENTY_MED_HOME_ID, FCTS_ENTY_MED_HOME_DESC, MED_HOME_ID, MED_HOME_DESC, FCTS_MED_HOME_LOC_ID, FCTS_MED_HOME_LOC_DESC, MED_HOME_LOC_END_DT_SK, PROV_NM, PCP_END_DT_SK, USER_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT_SK, PROV_REL_GRP_PROV_ID, PROV_REL_GRP_PROV_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_MED_HOME_HIER ) SELECT * FROM cte
